bead.title: bench: add bench-sets/ and concurrency-groups.yaml
bead.description:
Create authoring template files for the new bench architecture. No code changes; data only.

Files to create:
- scripts/benchmark/bench-sets/tb-2-1-canary.yaml
- scripts/benchmark/bench-sets/tb-2-1-full.yaml
- scripts/benchmark/bench-sets/tb-2-1-all.yaml
- scripts/benchmark/bench-sets/tb-2-1-or-passing.yaml
- scripts/benchmark/bench-sets/tb-2-1-openai-cheap.yaml
- scripts/benchmark/bench-sets/tb-2-1-timing-baseline.yaml
- scripts/benchmark/bench-sets/medium-comparison.yaml
- scripts/benchmark/concurrency-groups.yaml

Bench-set schema:
  id: <kebab-case>
  framework: terminal-bench
  dataset: terminal-bench-2-1
  tasks: [<task-id>, ...]  # or 'all' for full set
  default_reps: 3
  description: <one-liner>

Source the task lists from the current 'subsets:' block in scripts/benchmark/terminalbench-2-1-sweep.yaml (lines ~250-400). Each current subset id maps to a bench-set with the 'tb-2-1-' prefix.

concurrency-groups.yaml schema:
  groups:
    <id>:
      max_concurrency: <int>
      description: <one-liner>

Translate each current resource_groups[] entry from scripts/benchmark/terminalbench-2-1-sweep.yaml (~line 430): drop the 'rg-' prefix, preserve max_concurrency.

In-scope files (new):
- scripts/benchmark/bench-sets/*.yaml (7 files)
- scripts/benchmark/concurrency-groups.yaml

Out-of-scope:
- Wiring these into the runner (PR 1c/1d)
- Profile schema changes (PR 1a)

Spec: docs/helix/02-design/plan-2026-05-15-benchmark-runner-simplification.md section 'PR 1b'
bead.acceptance:
1. 'ls scripts/benchmark/bench-sets/*.yaml | wc -l' returns 7.
2. 'python -c "import yaml; [yaml.safe_load(open(f)) for f in __import__(\"glob\").glob(\"scripts/benchmark/bench-sets/*.yaml\")]"' exits 0.
3. 'python -c "import yaml; yaml.safe_load(open(\"scripts/benchmark/concurrency-groups.yaml\"))"' exits 0.
4. Each bench-set's task list is a subset of the current terminalbench-2-1-sweep.yaml subsets entries (verified by diff against the source subset).
